reason_of_clustering: These entities represent different expiration months for live cattle futures contracts, enabling investors to trade based on expectations of future price movements in the cattle market. The clustering reflects a common trading strategy focused on live cattle.

Similar to live cattle futures, these feeder cattle futures are grouped together as they also represent different expiration months. Investors use this cluster to speculate and hedge on a different segment of the cattle market, which provides a varying risk and return profile relative to live cattle.

This cluster comprises all cattle-related futures, encompassing both live and feeder cattle. It highlights the broader cattle market and allows analysts and traders to observe interdependencies and trends between different segments, providing insight for comprehensive market analysis.
